priority_1_sub_crawl_fix.title: Sub-Crawl startsWith Overhaul
priority_1_sub_crawl_fix.description: Replaced 60+ lines of complex platform/domain/keyword filtering with 12 lines and one rule: every sub-crawl link must startsWith the validated candidate URL.
priority_1_sub_crawl_fix.verified: Alcorn State shows zero generic playnsports.com/* links. Alabama sub-crawl stays on alabamabaseballcamps.com/*.

priority_2_url_resolution_tiers.title: 4-Tier URL Resolution Priority

tiers.tier_1: Authoritative JSON files (!bcusa, !playnsports, !totalcamps) — score 500, no search
tiers.tier_2: Existing campUrl in DB that resolves HTTP 200 + has baseball/camp content — score 300
tiers.tier_2a: Existing campUrl dead or generic → fall through to Tier 3

priority_2_url_resolution_tiers.verified: Alabama → TIER 1, Alabama State → TIER 2, Alabama A&M → TIER 3

priority_3_price_context_filter.title: Contextual Price Filtering (<$60)
priority_3_price_context_filter.description: Prices under $60 are checked against fee-related disqualifiers in surrounding text. Only rejected if context indicates a fee (parking, processing fee, deposit, etc.).

priority_4_hash_dedup.title: Hash Fragment Dedup
priority_4_hash_dedup.description: # and query strings stripped from URLs before startsWith check and crawledUrls dedup. Prevents re-visiting same page with different anchors.

completed_tasks: Identified contamination bug in extraction engine (Arizona State false positive) — FIXED
Implemented verified URL prioritization (Score 500+) from 3 master JSON files
Verified all fixes on Alabama, Alabama State, Alabama A&M, Alcorn State
next_steps: 1. Run batch of 5-10 DI schools to confirm clean behavior at scale
2. If clean, expand to full DI run (node smart_extract.js --limit=50)
3. Monitor logs — should see TIER 1/2/3 labels, only startsWith sub-links
5. [DONE] Update CLAUDE.md / GEMINI.md lessons learned with startsWith sub-crawl rule
